articles.title: Startup raises $40M to build AI coding agents
articles.text: A San Francisco startup announced a Series B round to expand its autonomous software engineering agents.

articles.title: New open model claims state-of-the-art code generation
articles.text: Researchers released an open-weight model that tops benchmarks for code generation and review.

articles.title: Data breach exposes millions of user records
articles.text: A misconfigured database leaked personal records, prompting a regulatory inquiry.
